name: watchtogether
description: WatchTogether — run the NestJS backend and Next.js frontend together, locally.

scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run db:setup
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm --prefix backend run start:dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix frontend run build
